$comment: Stryker mutation testing — scoped to the 5 server modules whose tests carry the most weight. Mutation testing catches happy-path-only assertions: a test that asserts `expect(result).toBeTruthy()` survives every mutation that produces a truthy non-equal value. The 'mutationScore' threshold gates CI to ≥ 80% on these files; expanding the scope is opt-in. See https://stryker-mutator.io/docs/stryker-js/configuration/.
_comment: Vitest is the test runner. Points at vitest.base.ts (NOT vitest.config.ts) on purpose: vitest.config.ts is the project graph (incl. the ui-component browser project that needs Playwright); the base config is the single node-env config stryker needs to run the mutated server modules' tests + the test-setup.ts mocks.
